title: Number of Ways to Form a Target String Given a Dictionary
titleCn: 通过给定词典构造目标字符串的方案数

testcases.input: words = ["acca","bbbb","caca"], target = "aba" Output: 6 Explanation: There are 6 ways to form target. "aba" -> index 0 ("acca"), index 1 ("bbbb"), index 3 ("caca") "aba" -> index 0 ("acca"), index 2 ("bbbb"), index 3 ("caca") "aba" -> index 0 ("acca"), index 1 ("bbbb"), index 3 ("acca") "aba" -> index 0 ("acca"), index 2 ("bbbb"), index 3 ("acca") "aba" -> index 1 ("caca"), index 2 ("bbbb"), index 3 ("acca") "aba" -> index 1 ("caca"), index 2 ("bbbb"), index 3 ("caca")
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: There are 6 ways to form target. "aba" -> index 0 ("acca"), index 1 ("bbbb"), index 3 ("caca") "aba" -> index 0 ("acca"), index 2 ("bbbb"), index 3 ("caca") "aba" -> index 0 ("acca"), index 1 ("bbbb"), index 3 ("acca") "aba" -> index 0 ("acca"), index 2 ("bbbb"), index 3 ("acca") "aba" -> index 1 ("caca"), index 2 ("bbbb"), index 3 ("acca") "aba" -> index 1 ("caca"), index 2 ("bbbb"), index 3 ("caca")

testcases.input: words = ["abba","baab"], target = "bab" Output: 4 Explanation: There are 4 ways to form target. "bab" -> index 0 ("baab"), index 1 ("baab"), index 2 ("abba") "bab" -> index 0 ("baab"), index 1 ("baab"), index 3 ("baab") "bab" -> index 0 ("baab"), index 2 ("baab"), index 3 ("baab") "bab" -> index 1 ("abba"), index 2 ("baab"), index 3 ("baab")
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: There are 4 ways to form target. "bab" -> index 0 ("baab"), index 1 ("baab"), index 2 ("abba") "bab" -> index 0 ("baab"), index 1 ("baab"), index 3 ("baab") "bab" -> index 0 ("baab"), index 2 ("baab"), index 3 ("baab") "bab" -> index 1 ("abba"), index 2 ("baab"), index 3 ("baab")
